mapper.select: select * from ncs_course where period2 >= curdate()
select * from ncs_course where cid not in (select course_id from ncs_student where member_id=#{param1}) and period2 >= curdate()
select * from ncs_course where cid in (select course_id from ncs_student where member_id=#{param1} and status='신청')
select * from ncs_course where cid in (select course_id from ncs_student where member_id=#{param1} and status='수강중')
select * from ncs_course where cid in (select course_id from ncs_student where member_id=#{param1} and status='수료')
mapper.update: update ncs_student set status=#{param2} where sid=#{param1}
